title: Groups and Raise modules enter public test phase
content_html:
It has been quiet on the channels recently because the team has been heads-down getting the next set of modules production-ready.

Groups and Raise are now in their public test phase. The team is actively looking for testers from inside the community to run the modules end to end and report anything that does not behave as expected.

Anyone who wants in can join the Test group on Telegram. Feedback from this stage directly shapes the final release, and testers who report meaningful bugs get a thank-you on top.
author: Cryptool
